# Public Data Refresh Report Template

Use one report per completed public-data evidence row. Reports in this
directory are evidence metadata only. Do not paste private standard prose,
private tables, generated private extracts, screenshots, or private examples.

Required fields:

- Requirement:
- Source class:
- Source name:
- Source URL or citation:
- Source license:
- Source version or date:
- Refresh command:
- Generated files:
- Diff summary:
- Private-source exclusion check:
- Behavior proven:
- Caveats and non-claims:
